voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Căn gác xép rung chuyển. Quanh họ, thế giới ảo tan rã — từng pixel, từng khối render. Phố Hoa Sữa đã biến mất. Phòng trọ số 7 đã biến mất. Chỉ còn khoảng không này — không gian ký ức duy nhất của cô — và nó đang nhỏ lại.
voice_adherence.fix: The voice profile demands clinical observation of collapse — 'quan sát sự sụp đổ tâm lý từ khoảng cách của một người kỹ thuật viên đang ghi nhận lỗi hệ thống.' This passage is cinematic/emotional instead. Replace with technical observation: render errors, resource depletion percentages, texture resolution dropping. Show the collapse through data, not metaphor.
voice_adherence.note: Strong adherence in the opening hầm sequence — ping numbers, node status, clinical body description. The voice profile's 'phẫu thuật' tone is well-executed when Cường is observing his own body and system. But it slips into conventional emotional prose during the gác xép scene, losing the cold technician distance that makes this voice distinctive.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 4 (Cường đưa ra lựa chọn: Anh sẽ hy sinh chính mình) is stated rather than dramatized as an internal process. The decision appears pre-made when he picks up the paper note, and the calculation scene reads as confirmation rather than struggle.
beat_coverage.fix: Add a genuine moment of hesitation or temptation — show Cường considering the safe option (disconnecting from outside, keeping his brain intact, finding another way later) before rejecting it. The outline says 'Tuyệt vọng → Rõ ràng → Quyết định' but the chapter skips Rõ ràng and jumps from despair to decision.
beat_coverage.note: Beats 1-3 are well-covered with specific detail. The ping instability, the fading bruise, the paper note resolution — all present and mostly dramatized. The emotional arc from despair to decision is the weakest link; it needs more internal friction.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Cường's dialogue in the gác xép scene: 'Anh đến để giải phóng em.' / 'Vì anh nợ em.' — This is generic protagonist speech. The voice profile specifies: 90% statements, no emotional declarations, counting/measuring obsession, sentences that break off mid-thought.
character_voice.fix: Rewrite Cường's lines to match his voice profile. Instead of 'Anh đến để giải phóng em,' try something like: 'Ngắt sâu. Từ trong này. Não anh cháy. Nhưng kết nối đứt hẳn. Em ngủ.' Short, technical, no emotional vocabulary. Let the sacrifice speak through action, not declaration.
character_voice.note: Lan's voice is better — the elongated final syllables, the tilted head, the questions. But even she slips into conventional dialogue ('Em sợ cái tối') when the voice profile suggests she should express fear through technical malfunction or repeated phrases losing meaning. The differentiation between characters is present but not sharp enough.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The paper note resolution is almost too neat — Cường conveniently remembers writing it at the exact moment he needs moral clarity. The plant was seeded in Ch 15, but the payoff feels engineered rather than organic.
plants_seeded.fix: Make the memory more fragmented and unreliable. Have Cường not fully trust his own memory of writing it — 'Anh nghĩ mình đã viết. Hoặc ai đó viết. Hoặc không ai.' This would reinforce his 60% memory fragmentation and make the moment more unsettling rather than redemptive.
plants_seeded.note: The fading bruise is an excellent plant — visual, physical, tied to both the magic system rules and the emotional stakes. It's integrated naturally and pays off without being over-explained. The node collapse status is also well-woven, serving both plot and atmosphere.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Căn gác xép rung chuyển. Trần dốc nứt toác. Kính vỡ rơi xuống sàn. Gối giữa sàn tan thành pixel.
prose_quality.fix: This is a list of dramatic events without sensory specificity or voice. Rewrite through Cường's technical lens: 'Trần gác xép — render error. Polygons tách rời. Kính: texture corrupt, rơi theo physics engine lỗi. Gối: vertex dissolution. Tài nguyên hệ thống: 3%.' Make the collapse feel like system failure, not movie destruction.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Vết bầm hình bán nguyệt — tím nhạt, viền mờ như mực bị nước lau qua. Hôm qua còn ngắt. Hôm nay chỉ còn cái bóng của cái bóng.
prose_quality.note: The chapter has excellent moments (the bruise description, the paper note in the drawer, the node status list) but also stretches of generic dramatic prose. Sentence variety is good — short punchy lines mixed with longer technical ones. The main issue is inconsistency: when the prose is good, it's very good; when it's lazy, it reads like any other fantasy novel.

continuity.note: Strong continuity from the previous chapter. Cường's emotional state (kneeling, crying, remembering everything) carries directly into this chapter's opening. The bruise detail tracks — it was vivid in earlier chapters, now fading because Lan is dying. The paper note from Ch 15 is resolved. Bà Lành's departure at the end of the previous chapter explains why Cường is alone with time to act. The 60% brain damage figure is consistent. One minor issue: the previous chapter ends at 2:47 AM with Cường at St. Vincent, but this chapter opens with him back at the hầm with no transition — a brief line about leaving the hospital would help.

violations: Cường's dialogue and internal monologue use emotional vocabulary and direct statements that contradict his voice profile (90% statements, no emotional declarations, technical/accounting vocabulary).

Lan's speech patterns don't consistently match her profile — she should use Northern Vietnamese poetic register mixed with technical terms she absorbed from Cường's brain, but her dialogue is mostly standard emotional speech.

The chapter doesn't mention Cường's body habits from the profile: touching xương sườn trái when panicked (he touches it once but clinically, not as a panic response), licking dry lips, smelling for real memories.
The 'Kẻ Đuổi' profile says she doesn't cry ('mắt đen luôn ướt nhưng không bao giờ rơi nước mắt') but in this chapter she cries multiple times with tears falling.
canon_compliance.note: No hard world-building violations — the magic system rules are followed (sốc ngược, đồng bộ hai chiều, vết bầm on real body). The violations are character-voice level, which is still canon per the character registry.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The seven-node transmission system and ping mechanics are mentioned but don't actively shape the scene. The node collapse is backdrop rather than obstacle — Cường doesn't have to work around it or make choices based on it.
lore_integration.fix: Make the failing nodes create urgency or constraint. For example: if he doesn't disconnect before all nodes die, the system crashes and Lan is trapped in corrupted data forever. Or: the unstable ping means his disconnect command might not execute cleanly, requiring him to manually hold the connection while his brain burns. Give the lore teeth.
lore_integration.note: The Neural Mantle technology is well-integrated — the sensory description of putting it on, the buồng triệt giác, the data flowing. The world does work in this chapter. But the specific lore about transmission nodes and ping thresholds could be more than set dressing.

engagement.weakest_moment: The percentage countdown (10%... 20%... 30%...) during the disconnection is mechanically predictable. It's the most dramatic moment in the chapter but reads like a progress bar — tension deflates rather than builds.
engagement.fix: Replace the countdown with something less expected. Perhaps the disconnection is not clean — Cường experiences fragmented memories from Lan's consciousness, or the system resists, or Lan's form flickers between different faces (the other patients whose data contributed to her). Make the ending strange and specific rather than cinematic.
engagement.note: The chapter successfully creates emotional stakes through the bruise detail and the paper note. The opening is strong — system collapse, clinical observation, hard numbers. The middle sags when dialogue takes over and the voice slips. The ending is affecting but predictable; it needs something weirder or more specific to elevate it.

three_weakest_sentences: Căn gác xép rung chuyển. Trần dốc nứt toác. Kính vỡ rơi xuống sàn. Gối giữa sàn tan thành pixel.
Cô cười. Nụ cười buồn. Chạm đến mắt — lần đầu tiên.
Cường đứng trong bóng tối. Không có gì. Không có ai. Chỉ có anh và khoảng trống.
three_strongest_sentences: Vết bầm hình bán nguyệt — tím nhạt, viền mờ như mực bị nước lau qua. Hôm qua còn ngắt. Hôm nay chỉ còn cái bóng của cái bóng.

Anh viết mảnh giấy này như một mỏ neo. Bảy chữ. Đủ để nhắc nhở bản thân tương lai rằng có một con người thật đang nằm ở đó, rằng mọi thứ anh sắp làm sẽ có hậu quả thật, rằng thế giới ảo không phải thế giới ảo — nó là nhà tù anh xây cho người khác.
Nút 1: chết. Nút 2: chết. Nút 3: dying. Nút 4: chết. Nút 5: không phản hồi. Nút 6: nhiễu 47.3 Hz. Nút 7: chết.
ai_patterns_detected: Symmetrical emotional beats: Cường and Lan take turns speaking in roughly equal-length exchanges, creating an unnatural conversational rhythm
The percentage countdown (10%... 20%... etc.) is a structurally neat but emotionally flat device common in AI-generated dramatic scenes
Several sentences follow the same pattern: short statement. Fragment. Longer explanatory sentence. This rhythm repeats without enough variation.

The 'sacrifice' scene follows a predictable emotional template: hero declares intention, love object protests, hero insists, they share a moment, hero acts. Subverting this template would strengthen the chapter.
Lan's final mouthed 'Cảm ơn anh' is a cinematic cliché — the silent thank-you as someone fades away
top_3_revisions: Rewrite all of Cường's dialogue in the gác xép scene to match his voice profile: short, technical, no emotional vocabulary. Replace 'Anh đến để giải phóng em' with something like 'Ngắt sâu. Não anh cháy. Kết nối đứt. Em ngủ.' Let the magnitude of his choice come through action and silence, not declaration.

Replace the 10%-20%-30% countdown with something stranger and more specific to this world's lore — perhaps Cường experiences Lan's fragmented memories as the disconnect happens, or the system glitches and he briefly becomes her, or the nodes die in sequence and each one takes a piece of the world with it in a way that's technically described rather than cinematically.

Add a moment of genuine temptation where Cường considers the safe option (disconnecting from outside, preserving his brain, finding another way to help Lan later). The outline specifies 'Tuyệt vọng → Rõ ràng → Quyết định' but the chapter jumps from despair to decision without the clarity beat. Show him almost choosing self-preservation before rejecting it — this would make the sacrifice feel earned rather than inevitable.
new_canon_entries: Cường wrote the note 'Lan. Phòng 4. St. Vincent.' the night before his first đổ bộ, as a moral anchor to remind himself that a real person was connected to the system
The seven transmission nodes can be individually monitored for status (chết/dying/nhiễu/không phản hồi)
Deep disconnect from within a đổ bộ state permanently severs the connection between user consciousness and server, potentially allowing the source patient to recover autonomously
Cường's system has a command for 'ngắt kết nối vĩnh viễn từ trạng thái đổ bộ sâu' with calculated probabilities for brain damage (97.3%), death (89.1%), and patient recovery (12.7%)
When the virtual world collapses, rendered environments disappear in order of least to most personally significant: Phố Hoa Sữa first, then Phòng trọ số 7, then the căn gác xép last
